shell_description: Navigate between the three primary areas without crowding the interface.
shell_footer_note: Account switching and reminders will live under Settings.
landing_title: Track zakat with a calm, native-feeling app
landing_description: The public landing page stays separate from the app. Sign in, create an account, or open the app area when you are ready.
landing_surface: This page is now the public landing page. The app shell and all app-specific routes live under /app.
home_title: Start with the latest wealth snapshot
home_description: This first shell slice gives the app a stable place to land before auth and data flows are connected.
home_next_up_body: We will wire the sign-in flow and keep these primary tabs protected for authenticated users.
history_description: This tab will eventually show previous calculations, payment state, and reminder attempts for each profile.
history_surface: Historical entries will follow the same spacing and surface rules as the rest of the app.
settings_title: Keep account setup in one place
settings_description: Profile creation, switching, delegated access, and reminder preferences will live here.
settings_surface: Account actions and preferences will use the same reusable patterns as other screens.
settings_active_profile_description: Pick the profile that is active in the main settings screen.
settings_active_profile_load_error: Unable to load the active profile list.
settings_active_profile_empty_descriptio: Create your first profile on the profiles page to start tracking zakat.
settings_active_profile_no_results_descr: Try a different search term or clear the search to see all profiles.
profiles_description: Create, rename, delete, and manage delegated access for each profile.
profiles_surface: Profile management now lives on a dedicated screen.
profiles_create_description: Add a zakat tracking profile for a person or household.
profiles_edit_description: Rename the selected profile or delete it if you own it.
profiles_edit_not_found_description: The selected profile is no longer available.
profiles_selector_description: Select the profile you want to edit.
profiles_selector_empty_description: Create a profile first, then select it here.
profiles_details_description: Rename the selected profile or delete it if you own it.
profiles_details_delete_description: Delete this profile and its linked access records.
reminders_title: Feature scaffold for reminder scheduling and delivery
reminders_description: Reminder setup will reuse the same shared patterns for cards, spacing, and state feedback.
auth_sign_in_description: Use your email and password to access your saved zakat data.
auth_sign_up_description: Start with email and password. We will sign you in automatically after account creation.
auth_email_description: We’ll use this address to create and access your account.
auth_sign_in_password_description: Enter the password for your account.
auth_confirm_password_description: Re-enter the password to confirm it.
profile_access_sign_in_required: You must be signed in to manage profiles.
profile_access_not_found: The requested profile does not exist.
profile_access_forbidden: You do not have access to this profile.
profile_access_owner_only: Only the profile owner can manage access.
profile_access_user_not_found: No user exists for that email address.
profile_access_owner_already_has_access: The profile owner already has access.
wealth_title: Feature scaffold for zakatable assets and liabilities
wealth_description: The wealth snapshot flow will inherit the shared app surfaces and text treatment.
wealth_surface: Snapshot entry and review will live here.
settings_app_experience_description: Language stays here. Navigation stays in the shell. Other preferences can join this page later without crowding the main screens.
settings_profiles_description: Switch between profiles, create a new one, and manage delegated access here.
settings_profiles_current_description: This is the profile the screen is focused on right now.
settings_profiles_current_owner_descript: You own this profile and can manage access.
settings_profiles_current_manager_descri: You can edit this profile, but only the owner can manage access.
settings_profiles_switch_description: Choose which profile to work with on this screen.
settings_profiles_empty_description: Create your first profile to start tracking zakat.
settings_profile_create_description: Add a zakat tracking profile for a person or household.
settings_profile_create_name_description: Use a short name you will recognize later.
settings_profile_access_description: Grant or revoke access for the selected profile.
settings_profile_access_owner_only: Only profile owners can manage delegated access.
settings_profile_access_owner_only_descr: Select a profile you own to invite or remove other editors.
settings_profile_access_email_descriptio: Use the email address linked to the account you want to invite.
settings_profile_access_revoke_descripti: These users can edit the selected profile.
settings_profile_access_revoke_empty_des: Grant access to a teammate or family member when needed.
settings_profile_access_revoke_confirm_d: This user will lose access to the selected profile.
settings_account_description: Sign out from this device when you are done.
settings_sign_out_confirm_description: You will need to sign in again to access your app data on this device.
history_empty_description: Past cycles will appear here after you create and save them.
profiles_empty_description: Create your first profile to start tracking zakat for a person or household.
reminders_empty_description: Reminder schedules will appear here once you set them up.
wealth_empty_description: Create your first snapshot to begin tracking zakatable assets and liabilities.
not_found_description: The requested page could not be found.
